Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I clearly remember what happened that day![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}You had a bandage on your chin because you cut yourself while shaving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I also remember handing the fee money to you directly! Or are you really going to say that this is my mistake?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Give me an explanation, right now! Or else...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}I'm so sorry! You're right, it's completely my fault![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Everyone is suspecting me of— Wait, what?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Well, the truth is I accidentally took the money home with me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}I've been meaning to bring it back here, but then I completely forgot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}It's just, the payment deadline was pushed back, so I didn't think it was that urgent...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Then I kept forgetting to bring it in each day, but I figured I'd get around to it eventually.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}I know! This is completely my responsibility![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}I'll make sure to explain everything... I'm sorry for the trouble![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}So there's the truth. I'm almost more dumbfounded than angry...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 2 25 25}How do you even call yourself a teacher!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Well, that concludes my business here.[n]{f 1 1}
